title: Reducción de casts as unknown as y unificación de fechas
highlights: Nuevo parseJsonbArray<T> en src/lib/lineItems.ts: chokepoint único para narrowing de columnas JSONB.

Eliminados ~10 casts as unknown as en useContractTemplates, useUserManual, useAvailableForklifts, useAuditLogs, useProspects, InvoiceDetail, QuotePDFButton, InvoicePDFButton, useQuoteConversionActions y pdf/contract/fetchers.ts.

formatMtyDate ahora acepta locale opcional; reemplaza format(parseISO(...)) en 8 archivos (BookingsPage, CalendarPage, MrrDetailPage, GanttRow, EquipmentListView, BookingPeriodCard, BookingBillingCard, ChangelogEntryCard).
